title: A Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into and Sign in a Memoramdum of Understanding MOA) with Doh-accredited Hospitals, Pharmacies and Laboratories, for the Referral of Clients or Patients Who May Need Health Services Not Available in the Health Facilities of Los Baños Municipal Health Office. Councilor Mark Lester B. Dizon 01/03/2023
